name: huayulab-ngaf
description: OctoBus package for Huayulab NGAF read-only security operations APIs. Exposes identity, logs, analytics, resource metrics, reference data, and read-only policy object lists through fixed allowlists.

HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/GetUserInfo.name: get-user-info
HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/GetUserInfo.description: Login to Huayulab NGAF if needed and fetch current API user information.

HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QuerySecurit.name: query-security-log
HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QuerySecurit.description: Query allowlisted read-only security logs such as IPS, DDoS, AV, WAF, TI, weak-password, outbound, regional, and ICS logs.

HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryBehavio.name: query-behavior-log
HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryBehavio.description: Query allowlisted read-only behavior logs such as web, email, IM, login, outbound file, session, alarm, and proxy-bypass logs.

HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryAuditLo.name: query-audit-log
HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryAuditLo.description: Query allowlisted read-only protocol, authentication, command, event, and compliance audit logs.

HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QuerySecurit.name: query-security-statistic
HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QuerySecurit.description: Query allowlisted read-only IPS, antivirus, DDoS, and proxy-bypass security statistics.

HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryFlowAna.name: query-flow-analysis
HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryFlowAna.description: Query allowlisted read-only traffic and behavior analytics by user, service, site, terminal, location, and online dimensions.

HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryResourc.name: query-resource-metric
HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryResourc.description: Query allowlisted read-only CPU, memory, session, online user, and physical interface metrics.

HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryReferen.name: query-reference-data
HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/QueryReferen.description: Query allowlisted read-only selector and reference data used by NGAF reports.

HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/ListPolicyOb.name: list-policy-objects
HUAYULAB_NGAF.HUAYULAB_NGAF/ListPolicyOb.description: List allowlisted read-only policy objects such as user blacklist, IP whitelist, and terminal anti-VPN entries.
